name: mujoco
description: MuJoCo simulation handles and rendering-friendly queries

linux.command: Download a MuJoCo release from https://github.com/google-deepmind/mujoco/releases and put mujoco/mujoco.h on the C include path.

notes: The C wrapper loads libmujoco at runtime. Set NANOLANG_MUJOCO_LIB when the shared library is not on the platform loader path.
